_fields.cache_write_5m: tokens written to a 5-minute ephemeral cache (~1.25x input)
_fields.cache_write_1h: tokens written to a 1-hour ephemeral cache (~2x input)
_fields.batch_discount: multiplier applied to input+output when using the Batches API (0.5 = 50% off)

_session_model: claude-opus-4-8 — the model this skill pipeline runs on; use it as the default for estimates unless the user pins another.
